worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Great question! Based on what I've found, there's nothing else you or your friend need to do. The referral status is **COMPLETE**, which means your friend has already been approved and met the $1,500 qualifying spend requirement. You've also only had **1** completed Platinum Rewards Card referral this year, so you're well within the annual limit of 7.

So it's simply a matter of waiting for the bonus to post to your account. According to the program, the bonus is credited after the requirements are verified, and typically posts within one to two billing cycles after qualification.

If you don't see it after a reasonable time, feel free to check back in with us and we can investigate further. Is there anything else I can help you with?
